text.message: Hey blue, want to work something out for the sheep port?
i get sheep u get wheat lol
We’re all in a great spot
Blue I got a brick for you
i shouldve just placed on the port
Dunno why black is stealing for you and I when red has 3
Would love to build a road
Blue can I get a trade?
We gotta help each other settle
i cant trade this wood rn
I’ll give you brick and sheep to port
